It is designed for a maximum load of 3680 W, equivalent to 16 A at 230 V mains voltage. The socket has a bayonet thread that allows easy and safe connection to the Solight P78 plug. For increased protection, the socket cover is equipped with a rubber seal that reliably prevents the ingress of dust, dirt and water into the contacts.
